description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Content updated (June 19, 2026)

AI summary (check the original article for precise information)

Hanno City runs 10 Hidamari Cafés and 2 Hidamari Gatherings as places where people with dementia, their families, and community members can come together.

【Hidamari Café】
A place to relax and enjoy time together over tea or coffee. Locations: Howatto, Rock Garden, McDonald's, Kinoka, Hinata, Welcia, SOMPO Care Lavière Hanno, Kusunoki, Shiki no Sato Hanno, Metsä.

【Hidamari Gathering】
A gathering for families caring for people with dementia and a space for the person with dementia to interact with others. Locations: Kusunoki, Chashoku Tanpopo.

Fees vary by venue. For details, contact the information desk at each facility, your local community support center (chiiki hokatsu shien senta), or Hanno City Nursing and Welfare Division.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/kenkohukusibu/kaigofukushika/ninchi-sisaku/ninchi-jigyou/7981.html
